name: lokakai-pack-server
description: LokakAI pack server with x402/T402 paywall

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['node_modules/@t402/evm/dist/esm/chunk-FJPMVWD7.mjs','node_modules/@t402/evm/dist/cjs/exact/server/index.js'].forEach(f=>{ if(fs.existsSync(f)){ let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); const patched=c.replace(/(\/{2} Plasma Mainnet[\s\S]*?\"eip155:9745\"[\s\S]*?name: )\"TetherToken\"/,'$1\"USDT0\"'); fs.writeFileSync(f,patched); } })"
